name: Kevin Park

current_profile.summary: Mechanical/automation engineer (4 years) working with PLCs, robotics, sensors, and control systems. Some C/C++ for embedded work; new to Python. Has participated in a predictive maintenance pilot and is curious about ML.

learning_intent: Wants to build intelligent automation systems (predictive maintenance, computer vision inspection, adaptive robotics). Goal: merge domain expertise with ML skills and safe deployment practices in industrial environments.

target_jd.title: AI Automation Engineer / Robotics AI Specialist
requirements: Develop ML solutions for industrial systems (predictive maintenance, vision-based QC)
Integrate models into real-time/edge environments; ensure reliability and safety
Work with data pipelines from sensors and OT systems to training/inference workloads
Monitor performance, handle failures, and iterate models over time

expected_skill_gaps.description: Python basics and data handling; backend service fundamentals for integrations.
Embeddings and multimodal basics; model limitations and reliability tradeoffs.
Latency optimization, deployment gates, versioning, and incident response concepts.
Secure tool integration and safe handling of outputs in systems that affect physical processes.
Computer vision basics for quality inspection.
